questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Amorphous solids have a fixed shape and volume.
questions.reason: Reason (R): They have a long-range order in their structure.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): In ionic solids, ions are arranged in a regular three-dimensional pattern.

opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The crystal lattice is a two-dimensional arrangement of atoms.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): In a face-centered cubic (FCC) unit cell, there are 4 atoms per unit cell.
questions.reason: Reason (R): Each atom is shared by 8 adjacent unit cells.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: In a face-centered cubic (FCC) unit cell, there are actually 4 atoms per unit cell, but each atom is shared by 8 adjacent unit cells. This is the correct explanation, but the statement is true, so this is option (A).
